ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "ocupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., Income Benefit (IB)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_types" (
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim type */,
  "claim_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the claim */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit being claimed */,
  "claim_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim type */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement for the claim */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the claim */,
  "received_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was received */,
  "processed_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was processed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_type_id") REFERENCES claim_types ("claim_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interpreters" (
  "interpreter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interpreter */,
  "interpreter_name" TEXT /* Name of the interpreter */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the interpreter */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the interpreter */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the interpreter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interpreter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_services" (
  "transport_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transport service */,
  "transport_service_name" TEXT /* Name of the transport service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of transport service (e.g., taxi, bus) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used by the transport service */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transport_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_requirements" (
  "claim_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim requirement */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement */,
  "interpreter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interpreter assigned to the claim */,
  "transport_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transport service assigned to the claim */,
  "requirement_status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., fulfilled, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_requirements_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_requirements_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_requirements_transport_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("transport_service_id") REFERENCES transport_services ("transport_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_requirements_interpreter_id FOREIGN KEY ("interpreter_id") REFERENCES interpreters ("interpreter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status_history" (
  "claim_status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim status history */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being audited */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the changes */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the changes were made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
